_doc: The model-TYPE capability CATALOG — DECLARED DATA, keyed by MODEL-ID (the HF/cloud string). registry-is-truth (AGENTS.md rule 8): this FILE is the single source ops + cognition both read; cli/capabilities.py loads it into MODEL_CAPABILITIES at import (fail-loud if missing/malformed — never a silently-empty catalog). Adding a model's capabilities = adding ONE entry HERE (no code edit) — mirroring how services.json declares what runs. This is the intrinsic half (what the WEIGHTS can do); it NEVER stores gpu_util/vram (rule 3 — that is the service layer's job, gpu.py JOINs it). Each field carries {value, source} with a provenance from PROVENANCE (declared|probed|measured|served); `provides` is the capability TAG set (⊆ CAPABILITY_TAGS). Every `provides` is GROUNDED — for a SERVED model in a hard services.json signal (--tool-call-parser → tools; chat_template_nothink → no-think; --runner pooling → embed; a chat model → chat,json); for an ON-DISK-NOT-YET-SERVED model (the retrieval fleet added 2026-06-12: code/visual embedders, rerankers) in the model card + build-prep/brain/embedding-research-2026-06.md, recorded with source `declared` and an `_note` saying 'ON DISK, NOT yet served' — never fabricated. `rerank` (cross-encoder/late-interaction scorers) and real `vision` providers (the VL pair + jina-v4) joined the vocab 2026-06-12. A genuine unknown is recorded honestly (value null, source declared). A services.json model with NO row here keeps hitting capabilities_for's explicit unknown→ASK fail-loud path (rule 8). DRIFT HOME: cli/capabilities.py docstring + ops/AGENTS.md models/VRAM section; drift assertion tests/model_capabilities_acceptance.py + tests/model_catalog_acceptance.py.

cyankiwi/Qwen3.5-4B-AWQ-4bit._note: RESIDENT worker (services.json chat-4b). UNCHANGED from the original inline row — values/behaviour preserved exactly (proven by tests/model_capabilities_acceptance.py: provides list, knee max_num_seqs=16, swarm KV=135574, context_ceiling=262144).

tools.note: live probe :8000 forced tool_choice → tool_call emitted; also --enable-auto-tool-choice + qwen3_xml parser in services.json

json_schema.note: L-transport PROVED resident vLLM 0.21 CONSTRAINS the decode (neg-control: no-JSON prompt still conformant). Re-probed live.

thinking.note: no-think model — chat_template_nothink.jinja (services.json); the day-one judge pick was chosen for exactly this

context_ceiling.note: services.json chat-4b config.max_model_len_ceiling (reachable solo)

voice_coresident_u0.49.note: 0.49 util + Orpheus co-resident; KV~one 64K conv → deep main collapses swarm to ~1-2

swarm_mode_u0.63.note: 0.63 util + NO Orpheus; 64K main leaves ~71K → seq-cap(16) is the sole bind → ~16 roles

concurrency_knee.note: C0.5 (2026-06-07, lead-supervised). NOT the stale literal 32 — bind flips on main context depth; the swarm Semaphore reads this, sized per the resident loadout.

speed_profile.note: approximate decode speed of the resident 4B-AWQ worker

Qwen/Qwen3.5-2B._note: services.json chat-2b — a smaller local chat worker (combo small-pair). Same qwen3 chat template family: --enable-auto-tool-choice + qwen3_xml parser + chat_template_nothink.jinja (services.json) ground tools + no-think. tools 'declared' (not yet live-probed on this id — probe before binding); json declared from response_format support of the qwen chat family.

tools.note: services.json chat-2b config: --enable-auto-tool-choice + --tool-call-parser qwen3_xml. NOT yet live-probed on this id — probe before binding.

json_schema.note: vLLM xgrammar likely available (same vLLM as the 4B) but UNVERIFIED on this id — record the gap honestly; probe before relying on grammar-constrained decode.

thinking.note: chat_template_nothink.jinja in services.json chat-2b config — a no-think worker like the 4B.

context_ceiling.note: services.json chat-2b config.max_model_len (no max_model_len_ceiling declared); the JOIN refreshes if a ceiling is added.

concurrency_knee.note: services.json chat-2b config.max_num_seqs=32; not C0.5-measured at this loadout — declared from the launch config.

Qwen/Qwen3.5-0.8B._note: services.json chat-08b — the smallest local chat worker (combo small-pair). Same qwen3 chat-template family signals as chat-2b/4b.

tools.note: services.json chat-08b config: --enable-auto-tool-choice + --tool-call-parser qwen3_xml. NOT yet live-probed.

json_schema.note: xgrammar likely (same vLLM) but UNVERIFIED on this id — probe before relying.

thinking.note: chat_template_nothink.jinja in services.json chat-08b config — a no-think worker.

context_ceiling.note: services.json chat-08b config.max_model_len.

concurrency_knee.note: services.json chat-08b config.max_num_seqs=32; declared from the launch config, not C0.5-measured.

stelterlab/NVIDIA-Nemotron-3-Nano-30B-A3._note: services.json chat-nemotron — a heavier local reasoner (30B-A3B MoE, AWQ, CPU-offloaded). NO qwen3_xml tool parser in its flags (--quantization compressed-tensors --cpu-offload-gb 6 --enforce-eager) → tools NOT declared on; a reasoner → thinking declared on. provides has chat+json (no tools, no fast — it is the slow heavy local option, cpu-offloaded + enforce-eager).

tools.note: services.json chat-nemotron has NO tool-call-parser flag → tool-calling UNVERIFIED. Record the gap; probe before binding a tools-requiring role.

json_schema.note: UNVERIFIED on this id; probe before relying on grammar-constrained decode.

thinking.note: Nemotron-3-Nano reasoner family — a thinker (cf. the cloud reasoners). Declared, verify by probe.

context_ceiling.note: services.json chat-nemotron config.max_model_len (cpu-offloaded; small ctx at this loadout).

concurrency_knee.note: services.json chat-nemotron config.max_num_seqs=8 (heavy, cpu-offloaded — low concurrency); declared, not C0.5-measured.

speed_profile.note: cpu-offload-gb 6 + enforce-eager → slow; not the fast worker.

BAAI/bge-m3._note: services.json embed-bge — an EMBEDDING model (vLLM pooling runner). --runner pooling in the flags grounds the embed tag. NOT a chat/tools/thinking model; provides is exactly [embed].

tools.note: an embedder, not a chat/tool model.

json_schema.note: embedder — no generative/structured output.

context_ceiling.note: BGE-M3 input length; services.json embed-bge declares no max_model_len — declared from the model's known limit, the JOIN refreshes if set.

concurrency_knee.note: embedding throughput, not a generative KV knee.

jinaai/jina-embeddings-v5-text-small._note: services.json embed-jina-v5 — an EMBEDDING model (vLLM pooling runner). --runner pooling grounds embed.

json_schema.note: embedder.

context_ceiling.note: services.json embed-jina-v5 config.max_model_len=8192.

Qwen/Qwen3-Embedding-8B._note: services.json embed-qwen3 — a large EMBEDDING model (vLLM pooling runner, gpu_util 0.92). --runner pooling grounds embed.

json_schema.note: embedder.

context_ceiling.note: Qwen3-Embedding-8B input length; services.json embed-qwen3 declares no max_model_len — declared from the model's known limit, JOIN refreshes if set.

Hariprasath28/orpheus-3b-4bit-AWQ._note: services.json tts-orpheus — a TTS VOICE engine (vLLM-backed, named voices + cued emotion, persona Pip). A model-id-bearing voice engine, so it is cataloged with a `tts` provides. SWAP-HOSTILE (~17min cold) — pin/pre-warm. NO role in the cast currently REQUIRES a voice tag — this is forward-looking completeness (the chat/embed/vision discrimination is the tested bar).

tools.note: a TTS engine, not a chat/tool model.

json_schema.note: TTS engine — no structured text output.

context_ceiling.note: services.json tts-orpheus config.max_model_len=12288 (the vLLM-backed engine's token window).

concurrency_knee.note: synthesis throughput, not a chat KV knee.

Qwen/Qwen3-TTS-12Hz-1.7B-VoiceDesign._note: services.json tts-qwen3tts — a TTS VOICE engine (transformers VoiceDesign, describe-a-voice, persona Sable). model-id-bearing → cataloged with `tts`. Forward-looking (no role requires tts yet).

json_schema.note: TTS engine.

context_ceiling.note: non-vLLM transformers engine — no served max_model_len.

nomic-ai/nomic-embed-code-GGUF._note: ON DISK (nomic-embed-code.Q6_K.gguf, 5.5G), NOT yet served — no services.json row; capabilities DECLARED from the model card + build-prep/brain/embedding-research-2026-06.md. A CODE embedding model (Qwen2.5-Coder-7B base, 3584-dim, last-token pooling). DISCIPLINE (silent-garbage traps): serve via llama.cpp with --pooling last AND prefix queries with 'Represent this query for searching relevant code: ' — wrong pooling/missing prefix returns confident garbage. Single-vector → joins natively into the store's vector layer (unlike LateOn's multi-vector). Role: the DEEP code space (allocated-window/dedicated-loadout indexing).

json_schema.note: embedder — no generative output.

context_ceiling.note: Qwen2.5-Coder-7B base context; not yet served (no services.json max_model_len).

concurrency_knee.note: embedding throughput, not a generative KV knee.

lightonai/LateOn-Code._note: ON DISK (1.3G, model.safetensors 569M + a Dense head), NOT yet served. A LATE-INTERACTION (multi-vector / ColBERT-style, ModernBERT-base) CODE retrieval model — the SOTA primary that ColGrep uses. NOTE: multi-vector output does NOT drop into the store's single-vector index — it lives in its own tool (ColGrep/Next-Plaid) as the agents' live code-search instrument. Smaller sibling on the Hub: lightonai/LateOn-Code-edge.

json_schema.note: retrieval model — no generative output.

context_ceiling.note: ModernBERT-base context; declared, not served.

concurrency_knee.note: retrieval throughput, not a generative KV knee.

Qwen/Qwen3-VL-Embedding-2B._note: ON DISK (4.0G), NOT yet served. A MULTIMODAL embedder — text + images + screenshots + video in ONE space (2048-dim, MRL 64-2048, 32K ctx, instruction-aware). Matched-pair with Qwen/Qwen3-VL-Reranker-2B. Provides embed AND vision (the first cataloged model to provide vision). Role: the VISUAL space (mockup↔screenshot↔code joins, visual drift). VRAM ~4-5G (must be telemetry-proven co-resident with the chat brain).

json_schema.note: embedder — no generative output.

context_ceiling.note: 32K per the model card; declared, not served.

concurrency_knee.note: embedding throughput, not a generative KV knee.

Qwen/Qwen3-VL-Reranker-2B._note: ON DISK (4.0G), NOT yet served. The MATCHED multimodal RERANKER for Qwen3-VL-Embedding-2B — a single-tower cross-attention scorer that re-orders image/text candidate pairs (trained together with the embedder, so stage-two genuinely corrects stage-one). Provides rerank AND vision. NOT an embedder (emits a relevance score, not a stored vector).

json_schema.note: reranker — emits scores, not structured text.

context_ceiling.note: per the model card; declared, not served.

concurrency_knee.note: scoring throughput, not a generative KV knee.

perplexity-ai/pplx-embed-v1-0.6b._note: ON DISK (5.6G), NOT yet served. A TEXT embedder (1024-dim, 32K ctx, MIT license). Distinctive talent: quantization-aware training → native INT8 (4x) and binary (32x) compressed embeddings with quality intact — relevant when embedding the WHOLE company-data corpus. Smaller sibling of pplx-embed-context-v1-4b.

json_schema.note: embedder.

context_ceiling.note: 32K per the model card; declared, not served.

concurrency_knee.note: embedding throughput.

perplexity-ai/pplx-embed-context-v1-4b._note: ON DISK (25G full-precision), NOT yet served. A DOCUMENT-AWARE text embedder (2560-dim, MIT, native compression like its 0.6b sibling) — the 'context' variant embeds each passage CONDITIONED on the full surrounding document (the productized form of late chunking). Role: the company-data future (contracts, decks) where surrounding-context filing beats isolated-chunk. Replaced the redundant Qwen3-Embedding-4B as the mid-tier clerk.

json_schema.note: embedder.

context_ceiling.note: 32K per the model card; declared, not served.

concurrency_knee.note: embedding throughput.

ibm-granite/granite-embedding-97m-multil._note: ON DISK (1.2G, safetensors 186M), NOT yet served. A TINY multilingual text embedder (97M, 384-dim, Apache-2.0, 12+ languages) — matches gte-multilingual-base (305M) quality at ~3x the speed, +14.6 over the R1 107m. CPU-runnable utility clerk for bulk/background embedding. NOTE: the R2 is 97m, NOT 107m (that is the older R1).

json_schema.note: embedder.

context_ceiling.note: per the model card; declared, not served.

concurrency_knee.note: embedding throughput.

jinaai/jina-embeddings-v4._note: ON DISK (7.4G), NOT yet served — services.json embed-jina-v4 is a placeholder (config.model empty). A MULTIMODAL embedder (3.8B) with text/image/code adapters → provides embed AND vision. Per the research it scores BELOW jina-code-0.5b on code and is largely superseded by Qwen3-VL-Embedding-2B for the visual lane; cataloged for completeness (it is on disk).

json_schema.note: embedder.

context_ceiling.note: per the model card; declared, not served.

concurrency_knee.note: embedding throughput.

sentence-transformers/all-MiniLM-L6-v2._note: ON DISK (888M), NOT yet served. The classic small sentence embedder (384-dim, 22M params) — a lightweight CPU-class general embedder. Cataloged for completeness (on disk, missing from the catalog).

json_schema.note: embedder.

context_ceiling.note: all-MiniLM-L6-v2 truncates at 256 tokens; declared.

concurrency_knee.note: embedding throughput.

jinaai/jina-reranker-v3._note: ON DISK (1.2G), NOT yet served. A LISTWISE text reranker (0.6B, Qwen3-0.6B backbone) — 'last but not late interaction': scores up to 64 documents in ONE forward pass with cross-document attention (candidates compete directly), vs per-pair cross-encoding. LICENSE: CC-BY-NC (non-commercial) — EXPERIMENTS ONLY, not for anything revenue-touching. NOT an embedder.

json_schema.note: reranker — emits scores.

context_ceiling.note: per the model card; declared, not served.

concurrency_knee.note: scoring throughput.

cross-encoder/ms-marco-MiniLM-L-6-v2._note: ON DISK (88M), NOT yet served. The classic CPU cross-encoder RERANKER — re-orders a retriever's top-N by reading (query, candidate) pairs together. Tiny, runs on CPU (zero GPU cost) — the 'free accuracy' precision stage in front of any embedding shortlist. NOT an embedder.

json_schema.note: reranker — emits scores.

context_ceiling.note: MiniLM-L-6 cross-encoder pair length; declared.

concurrency_knee.note: CPU scoring throughput.
